summary: Testing iteration 11 - Admin photo viewing (lightbox) and Item Name editing features. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Both features verified working.

issues: Console warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility improvement suggested but not blocking

passed_tests: Admin login: Successfully logs in via 'Admin Login' link with username=admin, password=admin1123
Photo upload API: POST /api/upload/photo accepts image files and returns URL
Photo serve API: GET /api/uploads/{filename} serves uploaded photos correctly
Photo in bill: Bills can store photo URLs in items[].photos array
Photo thumbnail display: Photo thumbnails render on bill page with correct src URL
Photo lightbox: Clicking thumbnail opens full-size photo in modal dialog
Photo removal API: DELETE /api/bills/{id}/items/{idx}/photos/{pidx} removes photo from item
Item names list API: GET /api/item-names returns list of all item names
Item name create API: POST /api/item-names creates new item name
Item name edit API: PUT /api/item-names/{id} updates item name
Item name edit UI: Pencil icon shows inline text input, checkmark saves changes
Item name edit persistence: Edited names persist after save
Item name duplicate check: API rejects duplicate item names
Item name delete API: DELETE /api/item-names/{id} removes item name
critical_code_review_comments: Photo lightbox in BillPage.js works correctly - uses Dialog component with lightboxImg state
Item name edit in ItemNameManagement.js uses inline editing with pencil button trigger
Backend endpoints for photo upload/serve/remove are properly implemented
Backend item name PUT endpoint validates for duplicates correctly

admin.method: Admin Login link on login page

seed_data_creation: Test bill with photo exists: ID=880c3622-5986-425f-9fdf-8f73d949bee9, photo=/api/uploads/1ba33a49-6087-416d-9f6b-3a2b21bffbc5.png
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified: 1) Photo lightbox works in BillPage - clicking thumbnail opens full photo in Dialog modal, 2) Item name editing works in ItemNameManagement - pencil icon triggers inline edit input with save/cancel buttons. Test bill ID 880c3622-5986-425f-9fdf-8f73d949bee9 has a photo for testing. OTP delivery is MOCKED - codes shown on admin dashboard.

admin_photo_viewing.details: Photo thumbnails display on bill items. Clicking thumbnail opens Dialog modal with full-size image. Close button (X) dismisses dialog.

item_name_editing.details: ItemNameManagement page at /admin/items shows all item names. Each item has pencil edit icon. Clicking edit shows inline input field. Checkmark saves, X cancels. Success toast confirms update.

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes are shown on admin dashboard instead of being sent via email/SMS
